summary: Refactor regression test passed. All backend endpoints behave identically to iteration_1, settings now returns clean JSON with no _id/ObjectId leak. Frontend Dashboard renders correctly with header, stats cards, today's checklist (progress visible as 4/5 after toggles), weekly schedule sidebar (Mon-Sat shown), edit-day buttons, settings dialog opens, calendar heatmap renders 84 cells (12 weeks x 7 days) with hover info and no React duplicate-key warnings.
passed: GET /api/plan returns 7 days in order monday->sunday with sunday is_rest=true
POST /api/sessions/toggle: total_exercises matches plan length (5), completed_at populates only when ALL exercises completed and clears when one is unmarked
GET /api/sessions works with and without start/end query params (HTTP 200)
PUT /api/plan/monday with valid payload returns 200 and preserves data; PUT /api/plan/notaday returns 400 with detail='Invalid day'
GET /api/settings returns clean JSON (id,email,reminder_enabled,reminder_time,timezone) — no _id/ObjectId leak; PUT /api/settings updates fields
Frontend loads with 'Stride' header, 4 stats cards, today's checklist, weekly plan sidebar, 12-week heatmap (84 cells)
Exercise checkbox toggle works and persists across reload (visible as 4/5 progress in screenshot)
edit-day-{day} buttons (7) open Edit Plan dialog
Heatmap cells render with stable keys (0 console errors, 0 duplicate-key warnings) and heatmap-hover-info appears on hover
mocked_integrations: Resend email (RESEND_API_KEY empty) — endpoint correctly returns sent=false reason=disabled_or_missing_config
